reviews.review_msg: the pop extra credit quizzes are a godsend. punnen is a decent prof, however his lectures are just him stating facts instead of actually teaching. his heavy accent, mixed with his messy handwriting, mixed with the fact he makes lots of errors, makes it difficult to follow along, definitely use lots of outside lecture time to grasp concepts fully

The other reviews are right. If you don't have a choice and have to take this course with him,practice every single week and go to office hours as much as possible. Not even close to the worst prof or course I've had, but it takes more work than it should. There are plenty of resources available online as well. Don't fall behind and you're gucci.

Moved the weight of our lowest midterm to the final, exams are direct copies from assignments (if you do bad its on you). Really easy final (taken from assignments and midterms). Accommodates well for students, really cares about his students learning/wellbeing. Really caring prof, who knows how to teach, would recommend taking it with him. :)

His self written "textbook" is horrible. His lectures are dense and hard to understand. His tests are the worst. Low class average. Too many questions packed into the 50 min limit. I think he's close to retirement age I don't think he cares anymore or maybe he never did.

He has is own textbook, but it's full with typos- it's annoying when you're practicing and you begin to question everything on there. he also has multiple select with multiple choice, which eats up a ton of time on the midterm. Grading scheme is also a pain if you're not good with exams- 90% exams, 10% homework. beware if you like to take your time

Professor Abraham's method for math seems ineffective. Cancelling office hours before midterms,and suggesting emails for help, are impractical for math problems. The midterm, with 20 multiple-choice and 4 long-answer questions, didn't account for solving time An assignment is due post-midterm including exam topics.I'd recommend avoiding his classes

The first thing he tells you is not to listen to this website and that he is a "good teacher". DO NOT LISTEN and TAKE ANOTHER PROFESSOR. His notes alone deserve a 1 star rating. He had a quiet, challenging, passive personality that does not work with teaching a hard course. He withholds information and doesn't reveal solutions to homework.

He's not great at teaching but he's a good "teacher". I had to mostly self learn and it was hard since solutions aren't posted but I felt he cared about students and tried to make our life easier. He was lenient with grading as well and changed the course structure to 3 quizzes + project instead of a 40-50% final which I found extremely helpful.

That textbook he uses couldn't have gotten any worse. how can you put a bunch of examples 0 solutions? There is not even a clear explanation written in the book that you can follow to understand how to solve the question. He is such a bad prof, teaching math without writing anything on the board just like a philosophy class reading the slides
